rag_rules: Use assume/guarantee labels and eq/const declarations for AGREE syntax
Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence
Branching logic should use nested if-then-else statements
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use initialized state for pre() expressions
Align helper declaration types with expression types
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>)
Declare initialized state for previous-value comparisons
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
